description: Product Description Sheep - Keeleco offers a range of incredibly soft ecological plush toys, children will love cuddling them and cuddling up to them. You will love imagining incredible adventures and turning these cuddly toys into real toys. Convenient size and easy to carry. Safety Warning Remove all labels before giving the plush toy to a child.
